name: humanity-union-platform
description: Humanity Union civic technology platform monorepo.

scripts.build: tsc -p apps/api/tsconfig.json && npm run build --prefix apps/web
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p packages/types/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p apps/api/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p apps/web/tsconfig.json
scripts.verify:decision-session: INITIATIVE_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_ANALYSIS_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_IMPROVEMENT_PROPOSAL_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_VERSION_REVISION_PERSISTENCE=memory DECISION_SESSION_PERSISTENCE=memory tsx apps/api/src/scripts/verify-decision-session-e2e.ts && INITIATIVE_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_ANALYSIS_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_IMPROVEMENT_PROPOSAL_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_VERSION_REVISION_PERSISTENCE=memory DECISION_SESSION_PERSISTENCE=memory tsx apps/api/src/scripts/verify-decision-session-e2e.ts && INITIATIVE_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_ANALYSIS_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_IMPROVEMENT_PROPOSAL_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_VERSION_REVISION_PERSISTENCE=memory DECISION_SESSION_PERSISTENCE=memory tsx apps/api/src/scripts/verify-decision-session-e2e.ts
scripts.verify:civic-compatibility-review: INITIATIVE_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_ANALYSIS_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_IMPROVEMENT_PROPOSAL_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_VERSION_REVISION_PERSISTENCE=memory CIVIC_COMPATIBILITY_REVIEW_PERSISTENCE=memory tsx apps/api/src/scripts/verify-civic-compatibility-review-e2e.ts && INITIATIVE_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_ANALYSIS_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_IMPROVEMENT_PROPOSAL_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_VERSION_REVISION_PERSISTENCE=memory CIVIC_COMPATIBILITY_REVIEW_PERSISTENCE=memory tsx apps/api/src/scripts/verify-civic-compatibility-review-e2e.ts && INITIATIVE_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_ANALYSIS_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_IMPROVEMENT_PROPOSAL_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_VERSION_REVISION_PERSISTENCE=memory CIVIC_COMPATIBILITY_REVIEW_PERSISTENCE=memory tsx apps/api/src/scripts/verify-civic-compatibility-review-e2e.ts
scripts.verify:initiative-collective-decision: INITIATIVE_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_ANALYSIS_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_IMPROVEMENT_PROPOSAL_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_VERSION_REVISION_PERSISTENCE=memory DECISION_SESSION_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_COLLECTIVE_DECISION_PERSISTENCE=memory tsx apps/api/src/scripts/verify-initiative-collective-decision-e2e.ts && INITIATIVE_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_ANALYSIS_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_IMPROVEMENT_PROPOSAL_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_VERSION_REVISION_PERSISTENCE=memory DECISION_SESSION_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_COLLECTIVE_DECISION_PERSISTENCE=memory tsx apps/api/src/scripts/verify-initiative-collective-decision-e2e.ts && INITIATIVE_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_ANALYSIS_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_IMPROVEMENT_PROPOSAL_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_VERSION_REVISION_PERSISTENCE=memory DECISION_SESSION_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_COLLECTIVE_DECISION_PERSISTENCE=memory tsx apps/api/src/scripts/verify-initiative-collective-decision-e2e.ts
scripts.verify:participation-eligibility: PARTICIPATION_AREA_PERSISTENCE=memory tsx apps/api/src/scripts/verify-participation-eligibility-e2e.ts && PARTICIPATION_AREA_PERSISTENCE=memory tsx apps/api/src/scripts/verify-participation-eligibility-e2e.ts && PARTICIPATION_AREA_PERSISTENCE=memory tsx apps/api/src/scripts/verify-participation-eligibility-e2e.ts
scripts.verify:vote-casting: INITIATIVE_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_ANALYSIS_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_IMPROVEMENT_PROPOSAL_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_VERSION_REVISION_PERSISTENCE=memory DECISION_SESSION_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_COLLECTIVE_DECISION_PERSISTENCE=memory PARTICIPATION_AREA_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_DECISION_VOTE_PERSISTENCE=memory tsx apps/api/src/scripts/verify-vote-casting-e2e.ts && INITIATIVE_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_ANALYSIS_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_IMPROVEMENT_PROPOSAL_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_VERSION_REVISION_PERSISTENCE=memory DECISION_SESSION_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_COLLECTIVE_DECISION_PERSISTENCE=memory PARTICIPATION_AREA_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_DECISION_VOTE_PERSISTENCE=memory tsx apps/api/src/scripts/verify-vote-casting-e2e.ts && INITIATIVE_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_ANALYSIS_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_IMPROVEMENT_PROPOSAL_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_VERSION_REVISION_PERSISTENCE=memory DECISION_SESSION_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_COLLECTIVE_DECISION_PERSISTENCE=memory PARTICIPATION_AREA_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_DECISION_VOTE_PERSISTENCE=memory tsx apps/api/src/scripts/verify-vote-casting-e2e.ts
scripts.verify:transparent-decision-results: INITIATIVE_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_ANALYSIS_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_IMPROVEMENT_PROPOSAL_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_VERSION_REVISION_PERSISTENCE=memory DECISION_SESSION_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_COLLECTIVE_DECISION_PERSISTENCE=memory PARTICIPATION_AREA_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_DECISION_VOTE_PERSISTENCE=memory tsx apps/api/src/scripts/verify-transparent-decision-results-e2e.ts && INITIATIVE_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_ANALYSIS_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_IMPROVEMENT_PROPOSAL_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_VERSION_REVISION_PERSISTENCE=memory DECISION_SESSION_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_COLLECTIVE_DECISION_PERSISTENCE=memory PARTICIPATION_AREA_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_DECISION_VOTE_PERSISTENCE=memory tsx apps/api/src/scripts/verify-transparent-decision-results-e2e.ts && INITIATIVE_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_ANALYSIS_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_IMPROVEMENT_PROPOSAL_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_VERSION_REVISION_PERSISTENCE=memory DECISION_SESSION_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_COLLECTIVE_DECISION_PERSISTENCE=memory PARTICIPATION_AREA_PERSISTENCE=memory INITIATIVE_DECISION_VOTE_PERSISTENCE=memory tsx apps/api/src/scripts/verify-transparent-decision-results-e2e.ts
